definitions.definition: A ruminant mammal (Okapia johnstoni) of the central African rainforest, having a reddish-brown body, whitish-gray cheeks, horizontal whitish stripes on the legs and hindquarters, and short horns in the male. The okapi is closely related to the giraffe.

meta.attributionText: from The American Heritage® Dictionary of the English Language, 5th Edition.
